findings.description: There are 2 console errors indicating failed resource loads with 401 status code. These should be resolved for optimal performance.

findings.description: The form fields for username and password are missing labels, which can affect accessibility.

raw_status.summary: The page appears to be mostly functional but has a few minor issues that should be addressed for better performance and accessibility.
raw_status.bundled_fix_prompt:
I ran a reliability audit on https://www.saucedemo.com/ and found the following issues.
Please fix all of them:

1. [LOW] Console errors
   Fix: Investigate and fix the server-side issue causing 401 errors for resource loads.

2. [LOW] Missing form labels
   Fix: Add labels for username and password fields.

After fixing all issues, make sure the site works correctly on both desktop (1280px) and mobile (390px) viewports.

findings.title: Mixed Content Issues
findings.description: The page is loading resources over insecure HTTP protocol, which is causing mixed content warnings. This can lead to security issues and might block some resources from loading.
findings.fix_prompt: Update all HTTP links to HTTPS in the page's code, specifically for fonts.googleapis.com. Replace http://fonts.googleapis.com with https://fonts.googleapis.com in the stylesheet links.

findings.title: Cookie Consent Popup
findings.description: The cookie consent popup is covering part of the navigation menu and product listings, which can be intrusive and affect user experience.
findings.fix_prompt: Implement a more user-friendly cookie consent banner that does not cover critical page content. Consider a bottom or top banner that is less obstructive.

findings.title: Navigation and Link Text
findings.description: Some navigation links have unclear or missing text, which can affect accessibility for screen readers and users with visual impairments.
findings.fix_prompt: Ensure all navigation links have descriptive text. For example, the link with the text '' should be updated to have a descriptive label.

raw_status.summary: The website has some issues with mixed content loading, a potentially intrusive cookie consent popup, and minor accessibility concerns with navigation links. Overall, the site functions but has areas for improvement in security, usability, and accessibility.
raw_status.bundled_fix_prompt: I ran a reliability audit on https://automationexercise.com/ and found the following issues. Please fix all of them: 1. [MEDIUM] Mixed Content Issues Fix: Update all HTTP links to HTTPS in the page's code, specifically for fonts.googleapis.com. Replace http://fonts.googleapis.com with https://fonts.googleapis.com in the stylesheet links. 2. [LOW] Cookie Consent Popup Fix: Implement a more user-friendly cookie consent banner that does not cover critical page content. Consider a bottom or top banner that is less obstructive. 3. [LOW] Navigation and Link Text Fix: Ensure all navigation links have descriptive text. For example, the link with the text '' should be updated to have a descriptive label. After fixing all issues, make sure the site works correctly on both desktop (1280px) and mobile (390px) viewports. name: Advantage Online Shopping
notes: Could not resolve action candidate: add to cart | Could not resolve action candidate: add to cart button | Action error overruled by success signals: Could not resolve action candidate: view details link

findings.title: Inconsistent button styling
findings.description: Buttons have inconsistent styling, with some having a rectangular shape and others being circular or having different font sizes.
findings.fix_prompt: Standardize button styles to have a consistent shape, size, and font across the website.

findings.title: Failed network requests
findings.description: There are 3 failed network requests to Google Analytics, which may affect tracking and analytics.
findings.fix_prompt: Investigate and fix the failed network requests to Google Analytics to ensure proper tracking and analytics.

findings.title: Missing alt text for images
findings.description: Some images are missing alt text, which may affect accessibility and SEO.
findings.fix_prompt: Add alt text to all images on the website to improve accessibility and SEO.

findings.title: Insufficient color contrast
findings.description: Some text and background colors may not have sufficient contrast, which may affect readability.
findings.fix_prompt: Ensure that all text and background colors have sufficient contrast to improve readability.

raw_status.summary: The website has some minor issues with layout and functionality, but overall it looks professional and is functional. However, there are some areas for improvement to enhance user experience and accessibility.
raw_status.bundled_fix_prompt:
I ran a reliability audit on https://www.advantageonlineshopping.com and found the following issues.
Please fix all of them:

1. [LOW] Inconsistent button styling
   Fix: Standardize button styles to have a consistent shape, size, and font across the website.

2. [MEDIUM] Failed network requests
   Fix: Investigate and fix the failed network requests to Google Analytics to ensure proper tracking and analytics.

3. [LOW] Missing alt text for images
   Fix: Add alt text to all images on the website to improve accessibility and SEO.

4. [LOW] Insufficient color contrast
   Fix: Ensure that all text and background colors have sufficient contrast to improve readability.

After fixing all issues, make sure the site works correctly on both desktop (1280px) and mobile (390px) viewports.

Journey context:

name: Demoblaze
notes: Could not resolve action candidate: add to cart | Could not resolve action candidate: add to cart button | Action error overruled by success signals: Could not resolve action candidate: view details link

findings.title: Inconsistent product description truncation
findings.description: Product descriptions are truncated, but some descriptions are cut off in the middle of a sentence, while others end with a period.
findings.fix_prompt: Standardize product description truncation to end with a period or ellipsis.

findings.title: Typo in product description
findings.description: The Nexus 6 product description is cut off and contains 'is powered by 2.7GHz quad-core Qualcomm Snapdragon' which seems incomplete.

findings.title: Missing alt text for images
findings.description: No alt text is provided for product images, which can affect screen reader users.
findings.fix_prompt: Add alt text to all product images.

findings.title: Inconsistent spacing between elements
findings.description: There are inconsistent spacings between elements on the page, which can affect readability.

raw_status.summary: The website has some minor issues with layout and content, but overall it looks professional. There are some inconsistencies in product descriptions and spacing between elements.
raw_status.bundled_fix_prompt:
I ran a reliability audit on https://www.demoblaze.com and found the following issues.
Please fix all of them:

1. [LOW] Inconsistent product description truncation
   Fix: Standardize product description truncation to end with a period or ellipsis.

2. [LOW] Typo in product description
   Fix: Complete the Nexus 6 product description.

3. [LOW] Missing alt text for images
   Fix: Add alt text to all product images.

4. [LOW] Inconsistent spacing between elements
   Fix: Standardize spacing between elements.

After fixing all issues, make sure the site works correctly on both desktop (1280px) and mobile (390px) viewports.

The Samsung Galaxy S6 is powered by 1.5GHz octa-core Samsung Exynos 7420 processor and it comes with 3GB of RAM. The phone packs 32GB of internal storage cannot be expanded.

$800

The Samsung Galaxy S7 is powered by 1.6GHz octa-core it comes with 4GB of RAM. The phone packs 32GB of internal storage that can be expanded up to 200GB via a microSD card.
